summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GOVERN.AI Step 1 fixes verification. All 9 technical fixes successfully implemented and working. Backend APIs tested (17/18 passed), frontend UI fully functional with correct enum values and debounced search.

minor_issues.issue: Chat API timeout after 10 seconds during testing
minor_issues.impact: Testing timeout only - actual functionality works (verified with curl)
minor_issues.note: LLM response takes >10s, but API returns correct response when given adequate time

minor_ui_improvements.issue: Modal overlay sometimes blocks interactions requiring force clicks
minor_ui_improvements.note: Functionality works, minor UX enhancement needed

passed_tests: Dashboard stats API returns valid KPIs (agents, policies, audit, compliance)
Agents API with correct enum validation (suspended vs paused)
Invalid enum values return HTTP 422 as expected
CRUD operations for agents and policies working
Regex sanitization in audit search (dangerous patterns handled safely)
Audit filters for outcome/risk_level working correctly
Chat functionality with GPT-5.2 integration working
Landing page loads with hero, language toggle
Dashboard KPI cards showing real data
Agent create dialog shows 'suspended' in dropdown
Language toggle EN/IT working on all pages
